fav_empty_p: Save the stickers you love to find them easily later.
hero_p: Engineered with 5-layer vinyl construction, our stickers are UV-resistant, waterproof, and built to outlast whatever you stick them on.
about_p: Our stickers aren't just printed; they are manufactured. We use a proprietary 5-layer process to ensure your designs withstand the elements.
feat1_p: From the strong adhesive base to the scratch-resistant UV laminate top coat, every layer serves a protective purpose.
feat2_p: High-fidelity 8-color printing ensures your brand colors pop perfectly, whether on matte, gloss, or holographic vinyl.
feat3_p: Dishwasher safe, weather-proof, and tested against fading for up to 5 years outdoors.
cat_p: Find the perfect finish and format for your unique designs.
prod_p: Our best-selling sticker designs, ready to ship.
all_products_p: Filter by category and max price to find your favorite stickers.
test_p: See how our stickers hold up in the real world.
test1_q: "These stickers have survived 6 months on my snowboard without peeling or fading. Absolute top-tier quality!"
test2_q: "I use them to brand my custom coffee tumblers. They easily survive the dishwasher every single time."
test3_q: "The holographic finish is insane. They catch the light beautifully and the detail in the printing is razor sharp."
form_p: Have a custom bulk order or need support? Drop us a message.
pp_description: DAKKN's Privacy Policy – how we collect, use, and protect your personal data.
pp_hero_p: We are committed to protecting your personal information. This policy explains how DAKKN collects, uses, and safeguards your data.
pp_sec1_p: When you interact with DAKKN — whether browsing our website, placing an order, or contacting support — we may collect the following categories of information:
pp_sec1_id_p: Full name, username, or similar identifiers you provide when registering or placing an order.
pp_sec1_contact_p: Email address, phone number, billing address, and delivery address.
pp_sec1_trans_p: Details of products purchased, payment references, and order history. We do not store full card numbers.
pp_sec1_tech_p: IP address, browser type and version, time zone, operating system, and device identifiers.
pp_sec1_usage_p: Information about how you navigate our website, including pages visited, links clicked, and referral sources.
pp_sec1_comm_p: Messages, feedback, and support tickets you send to us.
pp_sec2_p: We use the data we collect to operate and improve our business. Specifically, we process your data to:
pp_sec2_li1: Process and fulfil your orders, and communicate order status.
pp_sec2_li2: Provide customer support and respond to your enquiries.
pp_sec2_li3: Send transactional emails such as order confirmations, shipping notifications, and invoices.
pp_sec2_li4: Prevent fraud and ensure the security of our platform.
pp_sec2_li5: Personalise your browsing experience and display relevant product recommendations.
pp_sec2_li6: Send marketing communications where you have opted in (you may unsubscribe at any time).
pp_sec2_li7: Comply with legal obligations under Egyptian law and any applicable international regulations.
pp_sec2_basis_p: We rely on contract performance (to fulfil your orders), legitimate interests (to improve our services and prevent fraud), consent (for marketing), and legal obligation as the lawful bases for processing your personal data.
pp_sec3_p: We do not sell your personal data. We may share your information only in the following limited circumstances:
pp_sec3_li1_p: We share your name and delivery address with our logistics partners (e.g., courier companies) solely to fulfil your order.
pp_sec3_li2_p: Payment information is handled by PCI-DSS compliant payment gateways. We never see or store your full card details.
pp_sec3_li3_p: Aggregated, anonymised usage data may be shared with analytics tools to help us understand how customers use our website.
pp_sec3_li4_p: We may disclose your data when required by law, court order, or to protect the rights and safety of DAKKN and its users.
pp_sec4_p: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to enhance your experience on our website. The types of cookies we use include:
pp_sec4_td1_p: Required for the website to function, including shopping cart and login sessions.
pp_sec4_td2_p: Remembers your language preference (Arabic/English) and display settings.
pp_sec4_td3_p: Helps us understand how visitors use our site so we can improve it.
pp_sec4_td4_p: Used to display relevant ads and track campaign effectiveness (opt-in only).
pp_sec4_footer: You can manage or disable cookies through your browser settings. Note that disabling essential cookies may affect website functionality.
pp_sec5_p: We implement appropriate technical and organisational measures to protect your personal data against unauthorised access, accidental loss, destruction, or damage. Our security practices include:
pp_sec5_item1_p: All data transmitted between your browser and our servers is encrypted.
pp_sec5_item2_p: Only authorised personnel have access to personal data, on a need-to-know basis.
pp_sec5_item3_p: We conduct regular security reviews and vulnerability assessments.
pp_sec5_footer: While we strive to use commercially acceptable means to protect your data, no method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure. If you suspect a security breach, please contact us immediately.
pp_sec6_p: We retain your personal data only for as long as necessary to fulfil the purposes for which it was collected, including to satisfy legal, accounting, or reporting requirements.
pp_sec6_li1_p: is kept for 5 years to comply with Egyptian tax and commercial record-keeping regulations.
pp_sec6_li2_p: is retained for the duration of your account, plus 12 months after closure.
pp_sec6_li3_p: are kept until you unsubscribe or request erasure.
pp_sec6_li4_p: are retained for 2 years from the date of resolution.
pp_sec7_p: You have the following rights regarding your personal data:
pp_sec7_item1_p: Request a copy of the personal data we hold about you.
pp_sec7_item2_p: Request correction of inaccurate or incomplete data.
pp_sec7_item3_p: Request deletion of your data where there is no legal basis to retain it.
pp_sec7_item4_p: Object to processing of your data for direct marketing or legitimate interests.
pp_sec7_item5_p: Receive your data in a structured, commonly used, machine-readable format.
pp_sec7_item6_p: Request restriction of processing while a dispute is being resolved.
pp_sec7_footer_a: To exercise any of these rights, please contact us at
pp_sec8_p: Our website and services are not directed at children under the age of 16. We do not knowingly collect personal data from children. If you are a parent or guardian and believe your child has provided us with personal information, please contact us and we will delete it promptly.
pp_sec9_p: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of material changes by posting the new policy on this page with an updated effective date. We encourage you to review this page periodically. Continued use of our website after changes have been made constitutes acceptance of the revised policy.
pp_sec10_p: If you have any questions, concerns, or requests regarding this Privacy Policy or the way we handle your data, please reach out:
pp_legal_docs: Also read our other legal documents:
contact_description: Get in touch with DAKKN – custom bulk orders, support, or general enquiries. We're here to help.
contact_hero_p: Whether you have a custom bulk order, a question about your shipment, or just want to say hello — our team is ready to help you.
contact_form_sub: Fill in the form below and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.
contact_form_msg_ph: Tell us how we can help…
contact_form_success_sub: Thanks for reaching out. We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
contact_hours_footer: All times are Egypt Standard Time (EET, UTC+2). Public holidays may vary.
contact_faq_sub: Quick answers to the questions we get asked most.
contact_faq1_q: What is the minimum order quantity for custom stickers?
contact_faq1_a: Our minimum order quantity is 50 pieces for custom die-cut stickers and 100 pieces for custom labels. For holographic and specialty finishes, minimums may vary. Contact us for bulk pricing on orders over 500 pieces.
contact_faq2_q: What file formats do you accept for custom orders?
contact_faq2_a: We accept AI, EPS, PDF, and high-resolution PNG/JPG (minimum 300 DPI at print size). Vector files (AI, EPS) are preferred for the sharpest results. If you don't have a vector file, our design team can help convert your artwork for a small fee.
contact_faq3_q: How long does production take for custom orders?
contact_faq3_a: Standard production time is 3–5 business days after artwork approval. Rush production (1–2 business days) is available for an additional fee. Large orders (over 1,000 pieces) may take 7–10 business days. Delivery time is separate from production time.
contact_faq4_q: Are your stickers really waterproof and UV-resistant?
contact_faq4_a: Yes! All DAKKN stickers use a 5-layer vinyl construction with a UV-resistant laminate top coat. They are rated for up to 5 years outdoors, dishwasher safe (top rack), and tested against fading, peeling, and scratching. Perfect for water bottles, laptops, cars, and outdoor gear.
contact_faq5_a: Currently, we only accept and ship orders inside Egypt governorates. Domestic orders typically arrive within 2–5 business days.
contact_faq6_q: What if my order arrives damaged?
contact_faq6_a: We stand behind every order. If your stickers arrive damaged or defective, contact us within 14 days of delivery with photos of the damage and your order number. We'll send a replacement or issue a full refund — whichever you prefer, no questions asked.
contact_cta_sub: Browse our full catalogue or start your custom bulk order today.
terms_description: DAKKN Terms & Conditions – the rules governing your use of our website and purchase of our products.
terms_hero_p: Please read these terms carefully before using our website or purchasing from DAKKN. By placing an order, you agree to these terms.
terms_sec1_p1: These Terms & Conditions ("Terms") govern your use of the DAKKN website and the purchase of products from DAKKN Manufacturing ("DAKKN", "we", "us", or "our"), registered and operating in Egypt, Dakahlia, Mansoura.
terms_sec1_p2: These Terms apply to all visitors, users, and customers. By using our website or placing an order, you enter into a legally binding agreement with DAKKN under these Terms. We reserve the right to amend these Terms at any time; your continued use after changes constitutes acceptance.
terms_notice_p: By accessing this website or placing an order with DAKKN, you confirm that you are at least 16 years of age and agree to be bound by these Terms & Conditions. If you do not agree, please do not use our services.
terms_sec2_p: DAKKN manufactures and sells premium vinyl stickers, holographic stickers, die-cut stickers, sticker sheets, custom labels, and related products. We reserve the right to modify, discontinue, or limit availability of any product at any time without notice.
terms_sec2_sub_p: We make every effort to accurately describe and photograph our products. However, colours and finishes may vary slightly depending on your device display. Minor variations from product images do not constitute a defect.
terms_sec3_li1: All prices are listed in Egyptian Pounds (EGP) and include applicable VAT unless otherwise stated.
terms_sec3_li2: Shipping costs, where applicable, are calculated and displayed at checkout before you confirm your order.
terms_sec3_li3: We reserve the right to change prices at any time. The price applicable to your order is the price displayed at the time you place the order.
terms_sec3_li4: Payment must be made in full before your order is processed. We accept major debit/credit cards and other payment methods displayed at checkout.
terms_sec3_li5: In the event of a pricing error, we will notify you and give you the option to proceed at the correct price or cancel your order.
terms_sec4_p: Placing an order on our website constitutes an offer to purchase the specified products. An order is only accepted and a contract formed when we send you an order confirmation email. We reserve the right to decline or cancel any order at our discretion, including in cases of:
terms_sec4_li2: Inability to verify payment or suspected fraudulent activity.
terms_sec4_li3: Errors in product descriptions or pricing.
terms_sec4_li4: Inability to deliver to your location.
terms_sec4_footer: If we cancel your order, you will receive a full refund within 5–7 business days.
terms_sec5_item2_p: 2–5 business days within Egypt via our courier partners.
terms_sec5_item3_p: Currently, we only accept and ship orders inside Egypt governorates. International shipping is not available.
terms_sec5_footer: Delivery estimates are indicative. DAKKN is not liable for delays caused by courier services, customs clearance, or circumstances beyond our control. Risk of loss passes to you once we hand the parcel to the carrier.
terms_sec6_promise_p: If your order arrives damaged, defective, or significantly different from what was described, we will replace it or issue a full refund — no hassle.
terms_sec6_window_p: You must notify us within 14 days of receiving your order if you wish to return it.
terms_sec6_cond_li1: Items must be unused and in their original condition.
terms_sec6_cond_li2: Returns due to change of mind may be subject to a restocking fee and return shipping costs borne by the customer.
terms_sec6_cond_li3: Custom or personalised orders cannot be returned unless they are defective.
terms_sec6_cond_li4: Downloadable digital files are non-refundable once accessed.
terms_sec6_refund_p: Approved refunds will be credited to your original payment method within 7–14 business days.
terms_sec7_p: When submitting artwork or designs for custom orders, you confirm that:
terms_sec7_li1: You own or have the full legal right to use the submitted artwork, logos, and images.
terms_sec7_li2: The artwork does not infringe any third-party intellectual property rights.
terms_sec7_li3: The content is not illegal, offensive, defamatory, or otherwise inappropriate.
terms_sec7_footer: DAKKN reserves the right to refuse any custom order containing content we deem inappropriate. You will indemnify DAKKN against any claims arising from the use of your submitted artwork.
terms_sec7_sub_p: Custom orders require artwork approval before production. Once you approve a proof, DAKKN will not be responsible for errors in the approved design. Production begins within 1 business day of approval.
terms_sec8_p1: All content on the DAKKN website — including but not limited to text, graphics, logos, images, product designs, icons, and software — is the exclusive property of DAKKN Manufacturing or its content suppliers and is protected by Egyptian and international copyright and trademark laws.
terms_sec8_p2: You may not reproduce, distribute, modify, create derivative works from, publicly display, or commercially exploit any content from this website without our prior written consent. Limited personal, non-commercial use is permitted provided you do not remove any proprietary notices.
terms_sec9_p1: To the fullest extent permitted by Egyptian law, DAKKN's total liability to you in connection with any order shall not exceed the purchase price you paid for the relevant product(s).
terms_sec9_p2: DAKKN shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of the website or products, including loss of profits, data, or business opportunities.
terms_sec9_notice_p: Nothing in these Terms limits DAKKN's liability for death or personal injury caused by negligence, or for fraud or fraudulent misrepresentation.
terms_sec10_p: You agree not to use the DAKKN website or services to:
terms_sec10_li1: Violate any applicable law or regulation.
terms_sec10_li3: Attempt to gain unauthorised access to any part of the website or related systems.
terms_sec10_li4: Engage in any conduct that could damage, disable, or impair the website.
terms_sec10_li5: Submit artwork that infringes third-party intellectual property rights or contains illegal content.
terms_sec10_footer: Violation of these rules may result in immediate termination of your account and cancellation of any pending orders.
terms_sec11_p1: These Terms are governed by the laws of the Arab Republic of Egypt. Any disputes arising from these Terms or your use of our services shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the competent courts of Dakahlia Governorate, Egypt.
terms_sec11_p2: Before resorting to legal proceedings, we encourage you to contact us to resolve any issue informally. We are committed to addressing your concerns promptly and fairly.
terms_sec12_p1: We may revise these Terms from time to time. The most current version will always be posted on this page with the effective date. If we make material changes, we may notify you via email or a prominent notice on the website. Your continued use of the site or services after changes take effect constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms.
terms_sec12_p2_a: If you have questions about these Terms, please contact us at
terms_legal_docs: Also read our other legal documents:
about_description: Learn the story behind DAKKN — built from a passion for quality, engineered for creators who refuse to settle.
about_hero_p: DAKKN was born from a simple frustration — great art deserved better stickers. So we built them from scratch, one layer at a time.
about_story_h2: A passion project that refused to stay small.
about_story_p1: DAKKN started in a small workshop in 2019, frustrated by stickers that peeled, faded, and failed. Our founders — a pair of product designers and a materials engineer — spent two years perfecting a 5-layer vinyl formula that could survive everything from dishwashers to snowboard runs.
about_story_p2: What started as a personal project quickly found its audience: artists, brands, and creators who refused to compromise. Today, DAKKN proudly ships to thousands of customers across all Egypt governorates.
about_vision_p: To become the most trusted sticker manufacturer in the MENA region — where quality is the default, not the premium.
about_mission_p: Make industrial-grade vinyl stickers accessible to every creator.
about_promise_p: Every order ships with our 100% satisfaction guarantee.
step1_p: Your artwork is color-profiled and pre-press optimized for our 8-color printing system, ensuring pixel-perfect reproduction.
step2_p: Adhesive base → carrier liner → print layer → UV-resistant ink → scratch-resistant laminate. Each layer bonded under pressure and heat.
step3_p: CNC-guided cutting tables trace your design contour to within 0.1mm accuracy. Every edge is clean, every kiss-cut perfect.
step4_p: Every batch is inspected under UV lighting for color accuracy, edge quality, and adhesive integrity. Defective units never ship.
step5_p: Orders are packed in rigid-backed mailers to prevent bending, and shipped with tracking within 24–48 hours of confirmation.
values_p: The principles baked into every decision we make.
val1_p: We test every material against dozens of alternatives before it touches a product. Good enough is never good enough.
val2_p: Artists, brands, and makers aren't just customers — they're co-pilots. Their feedback drives every product iteration.
val3_p: We minimize waste through precise sheet utilization and use water-based inks wherever process allows.
val4_p: Fast turnaround is a feature — not a corner-cut. Our production lines are optimized to ship within 24 hours.
val5_p: No hidden costs. No vague lead times. You always know exactly what you're getting and when to expect it.
val6_p: Our stickers outlive the surfaces they're on. We design for 5+ years because your art deserves to stay exactly as you intended.
team1_bio: Product designer turned entrepreneur. Obsessed with the gap between beautiful art and terrible sticker quality.
team2_bio: Materials science graduate who spent two years testing vinyl compounds before landing on the perfect 5-layer formula.
team3_bio: Illustrator and print specialist who bridges the world of digital art and physical manufacturing with an eye for color accuracy.
cta_h2: Ready to make something that lasts?
cta_p: Browse our catalog or reach out for a custom bulk order. Either way — we've got you covered.

⚠️ That's a Pinterest PAGE link, not an IMAGE link.

To fix this:
1. Right-click the image on Pinterest.
2. Select 'Copy Image Address'.
3. Paste that link here instead!

Could not load image. Please ensure you are using a DIRECT IMAGE LINK (ending in .jpg, .png, etc.). 

Tip: Right-click the image on any site and choose 'Copy Image Address'.
